title: First drowning of the year reported at Fossil Creek
description: A 25-year-old man died in a drowning at the lower waterfall at Fossil Creek on Sunday, marking the first drowning of the year at the popular recreation site north of Payson.

title: Ancient Antarctic ice cycles impacted ocean productivity thousands of miles away
description: UW–Madison study links Antarctic ice sheet growth and decay to a 40,000-year rhythm in subtropical marine productivity.
